Active subevents

New subevents drop every week - stay tuned!

How to participate
  • Craft your own $PEPPER mascot!
  • Follow our main X (Twitter)@pepper_meme
  • Join the Telegram crew:@pepper_meme
  • Use your Become a Pepper mascot in your daily activities and sub events!

Every day, 3 active players will be selected for a weekly raffle (chat, compete in subevents and raid $PEPPER to shine and get spotted by pepper crew!).

Every week (Saturdays): through a raffle, 5 people out of 21 will be selected as winners and win $20 each + a ticket to finale raffle!

Grand final raffle

40 participants from weekly main event + 20 favorites (10 from Chili, 10 from Ghost).

Prizes:

$250

$150

$100

$50 x 4

How Favorites Are Picked: Chili & Ghost each select 1 person weekly after sub event winners are announced (3 in the final week, May 3rd–10th)!

Prizes will be distributed after raffle from all 60 finale participants

Weekly subevents

Every week, we’ll drop fresh subevents to test your $PEPPER spirit! These mini-challenges offer $25 prizes and a chance to become Chili or Ghost’s weekly favorite for the grand finale.

How subevent winners are picked: 1 person is picked daily and 4 picked on the last day, then raffle among 10 participants is made to select sub event winners

How Favorites Are Picked: Chili & Ghost each select 1 person weekly (3 in the final week, May 3rd–10th) rocking their Become a Pepper mascot!

Join the pepper universe!

Welcome to the vibrant world of $Pepper, where flavors and adventures intertwine in a universe teeming with variety. Here, every pepper from the sweet bell to the fiery ghost offers a distinct journey, each with its own story to tell.

In this realm, $Pepper isn't just a token; it's a journey through a landscape where each pepper character represents a different experience. Whether you're here for the thrill of the unknown, the pursuit of a dream, or simply to enjoy the ride, $Pepper offers a universe where every turn could lead to new discoveries.

Here, in the $Pepper universe, your adventure is shaped by the peppers you choose to follow, each one promising a taste of excitement, challenge, or comfort. Join us, and let the flavors of $Pepper guide you through an experience where the only limit is your own curiosity.

Why $Pepper?

Gamification for Engagement

First Game Launch : Our inaugural game will go live in March, setting the stage for a series of games that blend fun with brand promotion.

Unique Game Design : These games will not only entertain but also educate users about $Pepper, making each interaction a step towards deeper brand connection.

Branded Merchandise : Expanding our brand into the physical world, we will offer a range of branded merchandise, from apparel to accessories, allowing fans to showcase their love for $Pepper in their daily lives.

Utility Tools for Marketing

Reward System : We introduce a separate utility tool focused on marketing where participants can earn rewards, differentiating us from other projects where such utilities are game-integrated.

$Peppernomics

Total Supply : $Pepper will have a total of 1 billion tokens.

Launchpads : During the first 10 days, we will list on various launchpads to gain initial traction and community engagement

Initial Liquidity : On day 10, we will deploy 5% of the token supply into the liquidity pool, with a USD value determined by the performance of the launchpads

Liquidity Management : During the next 40 days after liquidity provision, we will list $PEPPER on additional platforms for increased visibility, and 71% of the total supply will be gradually liquidated back into the market to fund the project.

Token Allocation : The remaining 24% will be distributed across 8 wallets, each holding 3%, specifically earmarked for future listings, not for any other purpose.

Contract address:

Launch and Growth Strategy

Foundation and Launch

Active

Launch the first Telegram-based game to kickstart gamified engagement and brand immersion.Establish initial liquidity on the Base chain, alongside community-building campaigns.

Expansion and Utility

Planned

Expand gaming platforms to Google Play and the App Store while introducing a other apps for marketing and rewards.Launch The Pepper Academy to successfully educate new users and empower the community with essential knowledge and tools.

Partnerships and Scalability

Planned

Secure additional token listings on exchanges and form strategic partnerships to strengthen $Pepper's ecosystem.Introduce a merchandise line to further integrate $Pepper into everyday life and community culture.

Innovation and Sustainability

Planned

Continuously develop new games and host community events to sustain engagement and education.Enhance utility tools and explore emerging technologies to ensure $Pepper remains a leader in the memecoin space.

How to buy $Pepper?

Get MetaMask or your favorite wallet for free from the App Store or Google Play. For desktop users, visit metamask.io to download the extension.

Have ETH in your wallet to swap for $PEPPER. If not, buy ETH in the widget's 'Buy' tab, transfer from another wallet, or purchase on another exchange and send it to your wallet.

Connect your wallet using the 'Connect' button on the widget. Approve and sign the wallet signatures in Metamask.

Alternatively, you can buy $PEPPER on numerous centralized exchanges.

Our team

The Heat Behind $Pepper: Get to know the spirited team that fuels our growth. From tech wizards to creative strategists, our peppers are the heart of our innovation.

Chili
Cherry
Black Pepper

Chili

Chief Marketing Officer

Chili is the spark that ignites our marketing at $Pepper, embodying the essence of a Chief Marketing Officer with his relentless energy.

He's the charismatic face of $Pepper, bringing our story to life in AMAs and public relations with a warmth that's hard to ignore. His decisions shape our marketing landscape, from the tweets that go viral to the collaborations that expand our reach. His ability to negotiate and engage ensures that $Pepper's reputation spreads like wildfire.

$PEPPER is a meme coin with no intrinsic value or expectation of financial return. The coin is completely for entertainment purposes only.
